prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. That task isn’t getting any smaller by waiting—so take one bold step right now. One small action breaks the inertia. You don’t have to do it perfectly—just start. Remember, the version of you who waits will regret it, but the version who begins? They feel proud. Breathe, focus, and go. Momentum is on your side once you begin. Ready? Go—*now*.
